sections.title: Hello, I am ABHISHEK
sections.subtitle: Officially I'm an officer but I consider myself a student and a lifelong learner.
sections.intro: Welcome to my little corner of the internet. This website is a glimpse into — my journey, experiences, interests, and the things that inspire me.  I’m Abhishek Kumar from Patna, Bihar. My area of interests are academics, sports, travel, or learning something new, I like to give my best in whatever I do.

items.details: 3-year full-time, residential undergraduate program as undertrainee cadet of the Indian Army.
Physics, Chemistry, Math, English, Computer Science.
